meta.title: Minimal Portfolio
meta.description: Extreme restraint and intentional whitespace with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: Design matters
sections.subheadline: Digital experiences with intention and restraint. Every element earns its place.

sections.body:
Philosophy: subtraction. Every element earns its place, every pixel serves a purpose. Guides everything from brand identities to digital products.

San Francisco-based. Work with companies valuing craft over trends, substance over style, long-term thinking over quick wins. Featured in Awwwards, CSS Design Awards, Communication Arts.

items.title: Stripe Design System
items.description: Led Stripe component library redesign. Focus: accessibility, developer experience. Comprehensive documentation and migration guides.

items.title: Linear Brand Identity
items.description: Created Linear visual identity: logo, typography, brand guidelines. Cohesive design language across all touchpoints.

items.title: Vercel Website
items.description: Redesigned Vercel marketing site. Focus: performance, developer experience. 98/100 Lighthouse, sub-second load times.

items.title: Notion Brand Refresh
items.description: Refreshed Notion visual identity while maintaining recognition. Updated color palette, typography, illustration style.

items.title: Figma Plugin Ecosystem
items.description: Designed and built Figma plugin suite used by 50K+ designers. Focus: discoverability, performance, seamless integration.

items.quote: Remarkable restraint and intentionality. Every decision feels considered and purposeful.
items.name: Design Jury
